chunk_summary: This section focuses on a copy-ready tele-triage script and pathway-specific intake data fields within the end-to-end tele-nutrition service workflow, emphasizing digital tools, registries, and dashboards for tele-nutrition services.
learning_objectives: Understand the structure and purpose of tele-triage scripts in tele-nutrition workflows.
Identify key intake data fields required for pathway-specific tele-nutrition services.
Explore the integration of digital tools and dashboards in tele-nutrition registries.
Learn about guidelines and recommendations for telemedicine and digital health interventions.
key_facts: Telemedicine Practice Guidelines (2020) provide a framework for digital health services in India.
WHO's digital health guidelines emphasize the importance of monitoring and evaluating digital health interventions.
Pathway-specific intake data fields are critical for personalized tele-nutrition services.
Digital dashboards enhance the management and visualization of tele-nutrition registries.
The WHO Classification of Digital Health Interventions v1.0 categorizes digital tools for health system strengthening.
reference_quote: "Telemedicine Practice Guidelines (MoHFW/Board of Governors, 2020) provide a comprehensive framework for the practice of telemedicine in India."
document_key_topics: Tele-triage scripts and intake data fields
Guidelines for telemedicine and digital health
